designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

GIVE YOUR SPECIAL SOMEONE

Something Sweet

Shop our limited-time valentines specials, featuring decadent cakes and rich chocolates. Your significant other will love these treats.

SHOP SPECIALS

VIEW ALL COLLECTIONS

HANDCRAFTED WITH LOVE

since 1976

We are dedicated to crafting the highest quality gifts and treats. We have been perfecting our recipe for generations and take pride in every piece of sweet made in our kitchen.

Watch our story 🡪
